/admin/content/files.reason: No enabled route currently responds, but the DISABLED view files:page_1 (config views.view.files, confirmed status=false) declares this path. Claiming it risks a collision if that view is ever enabled. Also under the reserved /admin namespace.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: No enabled route currently responds, but the DISABLED view scheduler_scheduled_media:overview (config views.view.scheduler_scheduled_media, confirmed status=false) declares this path. Claiming it risks a collision if that view is ever enabled. Also under the reserved /admin namespace.

/blog.reason: Already claimed: it is the canonical URL alias for canvas_page entity 2 ("Blog", internal path /canvas_page/2, published). A new node alias here would collide with that existing entity page.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed. path-owner reports claimed=false with no route, alias, view, or entity responding to this path. Free to use as a new node URL alias.

/search.reason: Already claimed by the enabled Views page display search:page (route view.search.page, config views.view.search), a Search API listing over search_api_index_content. A node alias here would shadow/hijack the view.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed. path-owner reports claimed=false with no route, alias, view, or entity responding to this path. Free to use as a new node URL alias.
